top_signals.title: Major medical device manufacturer notifies nearly 4 million of breach
top_signals.summary: Information like Social Security numbers and health-related data was accessed, but the company said it had “no evidence that impacted information has been publicly posted or exposed on the internet.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
